turns.speaker: Neighbor
turns.text: Hi there, I'm sorry to trouble you — would you mind keeping the music down just a touch after ten? Thank you so much.

turns.speaker: Resident
turns.text: Oh, I'm so sorry, I didn't realize it carried. Of course, I'll turn it down right away.

turns.speaker: Neighbor
turns.text: That's very kind of you, I really appreciate your understanding.
